name: property managers processing 5–15 rental inspections/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 rental inspections/month, manual tracking causes missed deadlines, leading to tenant dissatisfaction. We automate inspections instead of spreadsheets and manual checklists.
problem_solved: manual tracking of inspections leads to missed deadlines and tenant dissatisfaction.
